title: columnea brenneri
intro: Columnea brenneri, also known as the Columnea or Goldfish Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family, characterized by its striking gold or yellow flowers and green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Columnea brenneri include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
